functions.name: crouton.core._utils.get_pk_type
documentation:
Patched method to get primary key type.
This patch replaces the original get_pk_type method.

functions.name: crouton.core._utils.schema_factory
documentation:
Patched method to create a schema without the primary key field.
This patch replaces the original schema_factory method.

functions.name: crouton.core._utils.pagination_factory
documentation: Creates the pagination dependency to be used in the router.

methods.name: crouton.core.ormar.OrmarCRUDRouter._get_integrity_error_type
documentation: Imports the Integrity exception based on the used backend

methods.name: crouton.core._base.CRUDGenerator.api_route
documentation: Overrides and exiting route if it exists
